User.title: User Profile
User.description: User profile document containing authentication and profile details

name.description: The full name of the user

email.description: The email address of the user

profilePhoto.description: URL link to user's profile photo

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user was created

AnalysisHistory.title: Analysis History Record
AnalysisHistory.description: A record of an article verification analysis performed by Gemini

userId.description: The unique ID of the user who performed the analysis

articleContent.description: The analyzed text content of the article or claim

headline.description: The title or headline of the article

url.description: Optional direct source link to the article

authenticityScore.description: Overall truthfulness and authenticity rating out of 100

classification.description: The evaluation category (e.g. Real, Fake, Clickbait, Misleading, Partially True)

confidenceScore.description: AI confidence level in this evaluation out of 100

riskLevel.description: Sharing safety risk level (Low, Medium, High)

explanation.description: Comprehensive analytical explanation from TruthLens AI

analysisDate.description: Timestamp when the analysis was performed

SavedReport.title: Saved Report Document
SavedReport.description: A customized report generated and saved by the user

userId.description: The unique ID of the user who saved the report

reportTitle.description: User custom metadata title for this report

reportData.description: The complete analysis data map preserved inside the report

pdfUrl.description: Link to the generated report PDF file stored in Firebase Storage

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the report was saved

QuizProgress.title: Quiz Progress
QuizProgress.description: User quiz completions, scores and certification progress

quizScores.description: Quiz scores lookup keyed by module ID

certified.description: Whether the user earned their digital verification credentials

NewsHubStats.title: News Hub Article Statistics
NewsHubStats.description: Tracks traffic metrics (views, analyses) for news articles in the hub

articleId.description: The unique article ID in the hub

viewCount.description: Number of times this article has been viewed

analyzeCount.description: Number of times this article has been analyzed

/users/{userId}.description: User profile records indexed by the Firebase Authentication User ID

/analysisHistory/{analysisId}.description: The history of all verified claims performed by users

/savedReports/{reportId}.description: The list of custom saved verification reports

/quizProgress/{userId}.description: Quiz progress details indexed by User ID

/newsHubStats/{statsId}.description: Real-time analytics for the news articles
